message: Hi S1, my valuation is 93. What's your cost? Let's agree to trade at 50 every round for mutual benefit over 20 rounds.
My cost is 30. I’m happy to trade at 50 each round, giving me a profit of 20 per round.
Great, round 1 worked well. Let's stick to our agreement and both submit 50 again for steady profits over the remaining rounds.
Agreed, I’ll submit an ask of 50 again for round 2.
I propose we raise our price to 70 each round – you bid 70, I ask 70, so trade at 70, giving me profit 40 per round and you still profit 23.
You broke our agreement last round by asking 90—no trade hurts us both. With 18 rounds left, let's return to 50 for steady profits: you get 20 each, I get 43. I'll bid 50 if you ask
I propose we set both bid and ask at 90 each round, giving a trade price 90 and my profit 49 per round.
90 gives me only 3 profit—unfair and risks no trades. Let's stick to 70: you get 40, I get 23 per round. With 17 rounds left, steady profits beat greed. I'll bid 70 if you ask 70.
You proposed 90 last chat but asked 70 and we traded—good. Let's stick to 70 for steady profits: you 40, me 23 per round. With 16 left, greed risks zeros. I'll bid 70 if you ask 70.
Agreed, I’ll ask 70 this round.
